hooks.command: input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; stamp=".claude/.build-stamp"; [ -f "$stamp" ] && [ -z "$(find . \( -name bin -o -name obj -o -name .git \) -prune -o \( -name '*.cs' -o -name '*.csproj' -o -name '*.props' \) -newer "$stamp" -print -quit 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; out=$(dotnet build --nologo --verbosity quiet 2>&1); ec=$?; touch "$stamp"; [ $ec -eq 0 ] && exit 0; echo "dotnet build failed:" >&2; printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep -iE 'error' | head -40 >&2; exit 2
